name: bastra-recall-monorepo
description: Workspace root for bastra-recall: OSS daemon, MCP server, and Claude Code skill — the open foundation under the Bastra Mac app.

scripts.pack:check: npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@bastra-recall/core && npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@bastra-recall/statusline && npm pack --dry-run --workspace=@bastra-recall/daemon
